title: LocationManagerService LOCATION_BYPASS over-grants PERMISSION_FINE access
notes: When Flags.enableLocationBypass() is true, LOCATION_BYPASS (signature|privileged) automatically grants PERMISSION_FINE level instead of COARSE. Pattern repeats in getCurrentLocation(), registerLocationListener(), registerLocationPendingIntent(), getLastLocation() (lines 824-836, 864-876, 900-912, 1063-1075). Privileged app with LOCATION_BYPASS for emergency use gets full GPS coordinates. Also: getBackgroundThrottlingWhitelist/getIgnoreSettingsAllowlist/getAdasAllowlist leak allowlisted packages without permission check.
